description: A dramatic designed propaganda poster in a high-contrast black-gold-and-white scheme. The right side shows a moody, heavily shadowed photo of President Trump walking forward in a dark suit, white shirt, and tie, wearing a white 'USA' baseball cap and clenching his right fist; a large American flag is faintly visible behind him and two suited figures (security/aides) appear small in the lower-right background. The left side carries bold distressed/grunge slab type stacked as a slogan: 'COMPANIES' (white) over 'ARE' (white, flanked by gold stars) over 'COMING HOME' (large gold). At the bottom left is the embossed Department of Labor seal next to 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF LABOR' and a row of gold stars. Visual style: cinematic, gritty, patriotic gold/black palette with weathered military-poster typography to convey strength and momentum. Messaging/propaganda technique: strongman-leader imagery (fist, forward stride) plus a triumphant reshoring slogan to credit the President with bringing manufacturing/companies back to the U.S. ('biggest reshoring wave in U.S. history', 'Promises Made. Promises Kept.'). Target audience: nationalist/economic base and pro-Trump supporters.
notable_text: COMPANIES ARE COMING HOME; U.S. DEPARTMENT OF LABOR
